title: Low Effort Sketches We Have A Problem Work In Progress
description: Join multi award-winning sketch duo/astronauts Low Effort Sketches as they prepare for a dangerous space mission. On the launchpad, Andy starts feeling the pressure, leaving Alice to contend with a string of unlikely characters hell-bent on scuppering the mission. Will they ever make it to space? T-minus 50 minutes until launch... ‘Hilarious’ (Chortle), fourth-wall breaking sketch comedy with ‘a fantastic sense of surreal mischief’ (Spectator). Winners of Leicester Square Theatre Sketch Off and Get Up, Stand Up.
